query:
ALTER TABLE `analytics_reports`
  ADD COLUMN `frequency` ENUM('daily','weekly','monthly','quarterly') DEFAULT 'weekly',
  ADD COLUMN `channel` ENUM('email','dashboard','email_dashboard') DEFAULT 'dashboard',
  ADD COLUMN `recipients` TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN `nextRunAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `status` ENUM('active','paused') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  ADD COLUMN `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `system_settings` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `key` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `value` TEXT,
  `category` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',
  `description` TEXT,
  `updatedBy` INT,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

INSERT INTO `system_settings` (`key`, `value`, `category`, `description`) VALUES
  ('platform_name', 'SmartPRO Business Hub', 'platform', 'Platform display name'),
  ('support_email', 'support@smartpro.om', 'platform', 'Support contact email'),
  ('default_country', 'OM', 'platform', 'Default country code'),
  ('default_currency', 'OMR', 'platform', 'Default currency code'),
  ('feature_marketplace', 'true', 'features', 'Enable Marketplace module'),
  ('feature_pro_services', 'true', 'features', 'Enable PRO Services module'),
  ('feature_sanad', 'true', 'features', 'Enable Sanad Offices module'),
  ('feature_hr', 'true', 'features', 'Enable HR module'),
  ('feature_crm', 'true', 'features', 'Enable CRM module'),
  ('feature_contracts', 'true', 'features', 'Enable Contract Management'),
  ('feature_analytics', 'true', 'features', 'Enable Analytics Dashboard'),
  ('feature_ai_assistant', 'false', 'features', 'Enable AI Assistant'),
  ('feature_arabic_rtl', 'false', 'features', 'Enable Arabic RTL support'),
  ('notif_new_company', 'true', 'notifications', 'Notify on new company registration'),
  ('notif_pro_expiry', 'true', 'notifications', 'Notify on PRO document expiry'),
  ('notif_contract_signature', 'true', 'notifications', 'Notify on contract signature required'),
  ('notif_new_booking', 'true', 'notifications', 'Notify on new marketplace booking'),
  ('notif_invoice_overdue', 'true', 'notifications', 'Notify on invoice overdue'),
  ('notif_leave_request', 'false', 'notifications', 'Notify on leave request submitted')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`);
